title: GANGSTA V8
description: GANGSTA V8 is a book by KOHSKE. The exported reason says: PAGE 100 CONTAINS SEXUALLY EXPLICIT IMAGES
descriptionParagraphs: GANGSTA V8 is a book by KOHSKE. The exported reason says: PAGE 100 CONTAINS SEXUALLY EXPLICIT IMAGES

Its interest lies partly in the way literary or informational writing gets collapsed into a public-morality problem. As a book, it can be read not only for subject matter but for the way form, tone, and circulation make a text feel dangerous, intimate, or politically usable to anxious officials.

It also matters as part of a wider censorship history in Texas. The present page is a dossier starter built from source-tracked ban records; the surviving note currently says: The Texas prison-ban record treats the book as excluded reading inside state custody, which shows how prison and mailroom censorship function as a government reading regime. The exported reason says: PAGE 100 CONTAINS. More publication history, translations, and close reading can be added later.

overview.englishDescription: GANGSTA V8 is a book by KOHSKE. The exported reason says: PAGE 100 CONTAINS SEXUALLY EXPLICIT IMAGES
banningParagraphs: GANGSTA V8 entered censorship debates as a book associated with morality, print scandal, and sexuality. In the current dossier, the main state objections cluster around obscenity and public morality.

The earliest event currently captured here is 2021-11-02 in Texas, where Texas corrections agencies and prison mailrooms excluded from prison circulation. The Texas prison-ban record treats the book as excluded reading inside state custody, which shows how prison and mailroom censorship function as a government reading regime. The exported reason says: PAGE 100 CONTAINS.
